zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell於1468年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，她的父親Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies25歲，母親Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers23歲。她於1490年2月15日與John Maxwell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年7月25日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾格倫維享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell于1468年出生在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯时，她的父亲Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies25岁，母亲Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers23岁。她于1490年2月15日与John Maxwell结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年7月25日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾格倫維享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell was born in 1468, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, was 23. She married John Maxwell on 15 February 1490. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 25 July 1530, in Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell est née en 1468, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxwell le 15 février 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1530, à Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell 1468 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers 23. Sie hat am 15. Februar 1490 John Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juli 1530 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell è nata il nel 1468 nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Maxwell il 15 febbraio 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1530, nel Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwellが1468年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで生まれた時，父Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garliesは25歳，母Elizabeth Douglas of Caversは23歳であった。1490年2月15日にJohn Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年7月25日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアグレンバーヴィで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell(이)가 1468년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1490년 2월 15일 John Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 7월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 글렌버비에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell nasceu em 1468, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxwell em 15 de fevereiro de 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1530, em Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell родилась в 1468 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxwell 15 февраля 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 25 июля 1530 г. в местности гленбирви, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell nació en 1468, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Maxwell el 15 de febrero de 1490. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1530, en Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
